description_long: This is a wooden picket fence with a central gate, constructed from vertical slats evenly spaced along two horizontal rails. The fence features a symmetrical design, with the gate section in the middle distinguished by diagonal bracing and a latch mechanism. The posts at each end are slightly thicker, providing structural support, and the top edge of the fence is flat and level. The wood appears untreated or lightly finished, giving it a natural, light brown color. The overall structure is lightweight and likely intended for decorative or low-security purposes, such as marking boundaries in gardens, parks, or residential yards. There are no ornate or decorative embellishments, emphasizing a simple, functional aesthetic.
description: A simple wooden picket fence with a central gate, flat top, and natural light brown finish. The design is functional and unadorned, suitable for gardens or residential boundaries.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the fence, central gate with diagonal bracing, and evenly spaced pickets.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence and the thickness of the posts and rails.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the gate and picket arrangement from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and construction details of the posts and rails.
